text: Do you use a firewall to protect your business internet connection?

options.text: Yes, actively managed and configured
Yes, but it's the basic one from my ISP
No, or I don't know

text: Is your Wi-Fi network using WPA3 or WPA2 encryption with a strong, unique password?

options.text: Yes, WPA3 or WPA2 with a strong unique password
We use a password but I'm not sure of the encryption type
No, our Wi-Fi is open or uses a weak/default password

text: Are guest devices kept on a separate Wi-Fi network from business systems?

options.text: Yes, we have a dedicated guest network
No, all devices use the same network
We don't allow guest devices

text: Do your employees use Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) to access systems or email?

options.text: Yes, MFA is mandatory for all critical systems and email
It's optional or used for some systems only
No, we do not use MFA

text: Are user accounts removed or updated promptly when staff leave or change roles?

options.text: Yes, within 24 hours of a change
It can take a few days or is sometimes missed
This process is not formally managed

text: Do you enforce strong password policies across all systems?

options.text: Yes, we enforce length, complexity, and rotation
We have a policy but it is not strictly enforced
No formal password policy exists

text: Is your important data backed up regularly, and are backups tested?

options.text: Yes, automated daily backups that are tested quarterly
Backups are infrequent or never tested
We do not back up our data

Legal & Compliance.text: Yes, client files and matter data backed up daily with offsite copy
Backups run but client files are not specifically included
No reliable backup system in place

Healthcare & Medical.text: Yes, patient records backed up daily and encrypted, tested quarterly
Backups exist but patient records are not separately verified
No reliable backup for patient data

Finance & Accounting.text: Yes, financial data and client records backed up daily with offsite copy
Backups run but financial records not specifically verified

Retail & E-commerce.text: Yes, transaction data and inventory backed up daily
Backups exist but POS and transaction data not specifically covered

text: Do you store or send sensitive data in encrypted form (e.g. client files)?

options.text: Yes, all sensitive data is encrypted at rest and in transit
Some sensitive data is encrypted, but not all
No, we do not use encryption

text: Do you have a data protection policy that staff are aware of?

options.text: Yes, we have a clear policy that is regularly reviewed
We have a policy, but it may be outdated or not well-known
No, we do not have a formal policy

text: Do all your computers and devices run up-to-date antivirus or EDR software?

options.text: Yes, all endpoints are protected and centrally managed
Most devices are protected, but it's not managed
No, or protection is expired/out-of-date

text: Are your systems regularly updated with security patches (Windows, software)?

options.text: Yes, we use an automated patch management system
Updates are installed manually and can be delayed
Updates are rarely or never installed

text: Can you track or remotely wipe a lost or stolen laptop or phone?

options.text: Yes, we have Mobile Device Management (MDM) in place
We can track some devices but cannot wipe them
No, we have no remote capabilities

text: Have your employees received basic cybersecurity training in the last 12 months?

options.text: Yes, all staff have completed recent training
Training was provided, but not recently or to everyone
No training is provided

Legal & Compliance.text: Yes, including training on client confidentiality, phishing, and matter data handling
Basic security awareness only, no legal-specific scenarios

Healthcare & Medical.text: Yes, including patient data handling, POPIA, and medical record security
Basic awareness only, no healthcare-specific scenarios

Finance & Accounting.text: Yes, including financial fraud, social engineering, and client data protection
Basic awareness only, no finance-specific scenarios

text: Do you conduct phishing simulations or test staff awareness regularly?

options.text: Yes, we run tests at least quarterly
We have done it once or twice
No, we have never tested staff awareness

text: Are staff encouraged to report suspicious emails or activity?

options.text: Yes, we have a clear process and a positive reporting culture
Staff can report issues, but there's no formal process
No, reporting is not actively encouraged

text: Do you have a cyber incident response plan or know who to call during a breach?

options.text: Yes, we have a documented and tested plan
We have an idea of what to do, but it's not formal
No, we don't have a plan

text: Are your systems monitored for unusual or unauthorized activity?

options.text: Yes, we have active monitoring and alerting in place
We rely on basic system logs only
No, we do not monitor our systems

text: Do you have cyber insurance that covers data breaches and ransomware?

options.text: Yes, we have a comprehensive cyber insurance policy
We have some liability insurance but are unsure if it covers cyber incidents
No, we do not have cyber insurance

text: Are you aware of any legal obligations (e.g., POPIA) regarding data protection?

options.text: Yes, and we have taken steps to comply
We are aware but haven't taken specific action
No, we are not aware of our obligations

text: Have you performed a cyber risk assessment in the last 12 months?

options.text: Yes, and we have a plan to address the identified risks
Yes, but we haven't acted on the findings
No, we have not performed a risk assessment

text: Do you have a nominated Information Officer (as required by POPIA) who is responsible for data protection?

options.text: Yes, we have a designated Information Officer
Someone handles it informally but it's not formalised
No, we have not appointed anyone

Legal & Compliance.text: Yes, we have a designated Information Officer and a compliant PAIA manual
Information Officer appointed but PAIA manual not current

Healthcare & Medical.text: Yes, Information Officer appointed and patient consent processes are documented
Informal compliance only, not fully documented
No formal POPIA compliance measures in place

Finance & Accounting.text: Yes, Information Officer appointed and client data retention policies documented
Some compliance measures but not formalised
No formal POPIA compliance in place

text: During load shedding, are your critical systems (router, server, NAS) protected by a UPS and do they shut down safely?

options.text: Yes, UPS in place with safe shutdown configured
We have a UPS but shutdown is not automated
No UPS — systems lose power abruptly during outages

text: Are staff aware of South African-specific scams such as SIM swap fraud, fake SARS emails, and CEO impersonation attacks?

options.text: Yes, we have specifically trained on these local threats
Staff have general phishing awareness but not SA-specific threats
No, our staff have not been trained on these scenarios

text: Do you control and monitor what access third-party vendors or IT contractors have to your systems?

options.text: Yes, vendor access is documented, time-limited, and audited
Vendors have access but it's not formally managed
We don't track or control third-party system access

Legal & Compliance.text: Yes, IT contractors sign NDAs and access is matter-specific and time-limited
Vendors have access but no formal NDA or access controls
Vendor access is not tracked or controlled

Healthcare & Medical.text: Yes, vendors cannot access patient records and access is logged
Vendor access exists but patient data segregation not enforced
Vendor access is not controlled or monitored

Finance & Accounting.text: Yes, vendors sign NDAs, access is time-limited and does not include client financial data
Access exists but financial data is not specifically excluded
No vendor access controls in place

text: Are your Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace accounts secured with MFA and reviewed for suspicious activity?

options.text: Yes, MFA enabled and we review access/activity logs
MFA is enabled but we don't review activity logs
No, these accounts are not specifically secured or monitored

Legal & Compliance.text: Yes, MFA enabled, activity reviewed, and legal documents access-controlled by matter
MFA enabled but document access not matter-specific
No specific security measures on cloud accounts

Healthcare & Medical.text: Yes, MFA enabled, patient data not stored in general cloud folders
MFA enabled but patient data storage not specifically controlled

text: Do staff use AI tools (such as ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, or Gemini) for work tasks, and does your business have a policy governing what data may be shared with them?

options.text: Yes, we use AI tools and have a clear written policy on data sharing
Staff use AI tools informally but there is no formal policy
We do not use AI tools in our business
I am not sure whether staff are using AI tools

Legal & Compliance.text: Yes, we have an AI policy that explicitly prohibits inputting client or privileged data into public AI tools
Staff use AI tools but there is no policy on client or privileged data
We do not use AI tools
I am not sure whether staff use AI tools

Healthcare & Medical.text: Yes, we have an AI policy that explicitly prohibits inputting patient data into public AI tools
Staff use AI tools but there is no policy on patient data
We do not use AI tools
I am not sure whether staff use AI tools

Finance & Accounting.text: Yes, we have an AI policy covering client financial data and regulatory requirements
Staff use AI tools but no policy covers client financial data
We do not use AI tools
I am not sure whether staff use AI tools

text: Are AI-generated outputs (reports, advice, emails, documents) reviewed by a qualified person before being used in client-facing work or business decisions?

options.text: Yes, all AI outputs are reviewed before use
Sometimes, but not consistently
No, AI outputs are used directly without review
We do not use AI tools
